Introduction.title: Secrets of the Church - Introduction
Introduction.story: The Healing Church, while not formally affiliated with the Hunters, remains one of our strongest allies. Located in the district known as the Cathedral Ward, access is often barred on nights when the Hunt is called. This night, however, the great bells of the Grand Cathedral toll without end. Ominous, as all communication from within the Ward has ceased. With such strange events, you have been dispatched by the Workshop to investigate.

Chapter 1 - Setup.title: Secrets of the Church - Chapter 1 - Setup
Chapter 1 - Setup.body:
ENEMIES:
3 Random Enemies, excluding Church Servants.

TILES:
Remove the Grand Cathedral
Remove Oedon Chapel
Alleyway
Courtyard Lamp
The Great Bridge
Tomb of Oedon
{n} x2 Random (Max 6)

Chapter 2 - Setup.title: Secrets of the Church - Chapter 2 - Setup
Chapter 2 - Setup.body:
ENEMIES:
3 Random Enemies, excluding Church Giants.

TILES:
Remove the Grand Cathedral
Graveyard
Occupied House
The Great Bridge
Tomb of Oedon
{n} x2 Random (Max 6)

SPECIAL RULES CARDS:
Secrets of the Church card 15

Chapter 3 - Setup.title: Secrets of the Church - Chapter 3 - Setup
Chapter 3 - Setup.body:
ENEMIES:
Church Giant
Church Servant
1 Random Enemy

TILES:
Remove the Grand Cathedral
Courtyard Lamp
Graveyard
Ransacked House
Oedon Chapel
{n} x2 Random (Max 6)

1.title: ACCESS TO CATHEDRAL WARD
1.story: On a usual night of the Hunt, the Cathedral Ward would barricade itself off from greater Yharnam, leaving few ways in or out... But strange events are happening this night. The bells of the Grand Cathedral, which usually mark the start of the Hunt, have not ceased, and the servants of the Church have been seen wandering the streets of Central Yharnam, far from where they belong... We must find entry to the Ward and see what has befallen it.
1.goal: When you have collected at least 2 Insight: Reveal card 2.

2.title: ACCESS TO CATHEDRAL WARD
2.story: If the information you have gathered is to be believed, there is a secret entrance to the Cathedral Ward located within the Tomb of Oedon. This night grows long-let us make our way there.
2.goal: End a move on the Tomb of Oedon tile: Reveal card 3.

3.title: ACCESS TO CATHEDRAL WARD
3.story: The towering graveyard looms before you. Something is amiss, however-as you approach the set of large wrought-iron gates leading to the passage, you see a contingent of the creatures controlled by the clergy...
3.body:
Reveal card 4.
Surround the Tomb of Oedon tile with Fog Gates. Spawn 1 Church Servant and 1 Church Giant on its {lamp} space. If 3+ Hunters, spawn 1 additional Church Giant. They respawn to that space on {reset}.
3.goal: Complete the Hunt at the end of a round if no Enemies remain on the Tomb of Oedon tile: Reveal card 5.

4.title: PASSAGE GUARDS
4.body:
Place 1 Insight token on this card. When the Church Servant would be slain, instead, remove the token and Heal all {dmg} from it. Token is returned on {reset}. At the end of each round, it makes 1 bonus Activation, targeting the Hunter on its tile with the lowest HP.

The Church Giants can never become Staggered and, if Ability is flipped, replace it with their Special.

5.title: PASSAGE TO OEDON CHAPEL
5.story: The last of the creatures falls. From its corpse, you find a key to the large gates. Proceeding forward, you find a passage spiraling upwards, connecting you to the crypts beneath Oedon Chapel.
5.body: Distribute 2 Consumables and the Empty Phantasm Shell reward among the Hunters.

6.title: THE GREAT BRIDGE
6.story: The Great Bridge is the main access from Central Yharnam to the Cathedral Ward. Entering it, you see a large throng of townsfolk, seemingly trying to force their way across. If we are to gain access ourselves, they must be dealt with first.
6.body:
Reveal card 7.
Surround The Great Bridge tile with Fog Gates. Spawn 1 Hunter Mob on The Great Bridge {enemy?} space instead of the usual Enemy. It respawns to that space on {reset}.
6.goal: Complete this Mission by slaying this Hunter Mob: Reveal cards 8 and 9.
6.note: Spawn-space icon is a purple round icon with a claw mark; unsure which numbered enemy icon it is.

7.title: PANICKED HORDE
7.body:
Place 2 Insight tokens on this card. If 3+ Hunters, place 1 additional token. When the Hunter Mob would be slain, instead, remove 1 token and Heal all {dmg} from it. Tokens are returned on {reset}. Replace its Ability with:

ABILITY: OVERRUN
All Hunters on The Great Bridge tile must Dodge ({slow}) or suffer 2 {dmg} and Stun.
7.note: Dodge icon is a single large dark-red arrowhead, encoded {slow} by color.

8.title: BARRED PASSAGE
8.body:
Unfortunately, the entrance from The Great Bridge to the Cathedral Ward has been blocked off.

Place a Fog Gate token on the opposite side to mark that it is impassable.

9.title: BECKONING OF THE BELLS
9.story: As you feared, access from The Great Bridge lies barred and barricaded... But the behavior of the townsfolk lingers in your mind. They did not seem to be fleeing, but instead trying to force their way into the Cathedral Ward...?
9.body: Distribute the Hunter's Torch reward and the Evelyn firearm among the Hunters.

10.title: ADELLA'S PLIGHT
10.story: A young woman, dressed in the garb of the Church, approaches you. "Hunter! Greetings, I am Adella, servant of the Church. I am trying to find my way back to the Cathedral Ward, but these creatures block every passage. But I do know of one remaining way. ...Perhaps you can escort me?"
10.body: Place 1 Survivor token on the Courtyard Lamp space. Any Hunter may pick up the token when they move out of that space. Token is returned to the Courtyard Lamp space if the Hunter teleports or goes to the Dream.
10.goal: End a move on the Alleyway space with the token: Reveal card 11.

11.title: ADELLA'S PLIGHT
11.story: Approaching the alleyway, Adella rushes forward. "It's this way, Hunter." She swiftly enters, moving ahead of you. Suddenly, a figure rises from the darkness-that of a towering Huntsman's Minion! You shout to her. She turns just in time to avoid being crushed by the large creature, who instead slams into the alley wall, sending it crumbling from the impact... Angered, it turns its attention toward you.
11.body: Spawn 1 Huntsman's Minion on the Alleyway space. It respawns to this space on {reset}.
11.goal: Complete this Mission by Interacting on the Alleyway space: Reveal card 12.

12.title: AIDING ADELLA
12.story: The passage lies entirely blocked, rubble piled high before you. From the other side, you hear Adella's muffled voice. "Are you Ok? I-I'm fine, but the passage is blocked! I... I hear them coming! I can't stay! Thank you, brave Hunter! Be safe!"
12.body: Distribute 1 Consumable and the Caryll Rune: Guidance reward among the Hunters.

13.title: AGENTS OF THE CHURCH
13.story: The Church Servants, creatures in service to the Choir and the clergy, have been spotted roaming the streets of Central Yharnam. It is absolutely unheard of for these creatures to leave the confines of the Cathedral Ward. Let us seek them out and find their purpose here...
13.body: Place {n} +1 Insight tokens on this card. When this card is revealed, and after each {reset}, spawn 1 Church Servant on each space with a {enemy?} or {lamp} icon other than the Central Lamp. Each time a Church Servant is slain, remove 1 token from this card.
13.goal: Complete this Mission when this card has no remaining tokens: Reveal card 14.
13.note: First space icon is a green round icon; unsure which numbered enemy icon it is. Second is a dark blue-grey round icon, encoded {lamp} (card excludes the Central Lamp).

14.title: SLAYING THE SERVANTS
14.story: Searching over the corpses of the Church Servants, you find a number of Hunter relics and tools in their possession. Why would these creatures be after such items...?
14.body: Distribute the Augur of Ebrietas reward and the Rosmarinus firearm among the Hunters.

15.title: SPECIAL SETUP
15.body: Before generating the tile deck, take the Oedon Chapel tile and connect it to the Central Lamp. Then, take The Great Bridge and Tomb of Oedon tiles and connect them to Oedon Chapel.

16.title: ACCESS TO THE INNER PLAZA
16.story: From the hidden passage in the Tomb of Oedon, you have gained access to the Cathedral Ward. This was merely the first step, however, as your destination is the Grand Cathedral at the heart of the district. To access it, you will need to pass through the main gate into the Central Plaza, beyond the old graveyard. Exiting from Oedon Chapel into the streets, you find the Ward in chaos. Creatures infest the district and panic has overtaken the townsfolk, punctuated by the incessant tolling bells of the Grand Cathedral.
16.goal: End a move on the Graveyard tile: Reveal card 17.

17.title: ACCESS TO THE INNER PLAZA
17.story: From the graveyard, you come to the entrance to the central plaza of the Cathedral Ward... The large drop-gate securely locked... More protection by the Church... It is said that only those with a Hunter Chief Emblem, a sigil of the Church Hunters, can open the gate once closed...
17.body:
This card remains in play until cards 18 and 22 have both been revealed.
Block 1 exit on the Graveyard with a Fog Gate to mark the entrance to the Central Plaza. It cannot be crossed.
17.goal:
End a move on The Great Bridge tile: Reveal card 18.
End a move on the Tomb of Oedon tile: Reveal card 22.

18.title: THE CLERIC BEAST
18.story: Re-entering The Great Bridge, you find it littered with bodies-a mixture of townsfolk, infected, and the servants of the Church. Perhaps somewhere in this tangle of bodies you can find the emblem you seek. Just as you reach the center of the bridge, a loud screech is heard as a vast shadow descends upon the bridge, crashing down to reveal a massive Cleric Beast.
18.body:
Surround The Great Bridge tile with Fog Gates. Spawn the Cleric Beast (Phase 2) on its {enemy?} space.
It respawns to that space on {reset}.
18.goal: Gain 1 Insight by slaying the Cleric Beast: Reveal cards 19 and 20.
18.note: Spawn-space icon is a purple round icon with a claw mark; unsure which numbered enemy icon it is.

19.title: ACCESS TO THE INNER PLAZA
19.story: You have found the emblem you need to raise the gate leading to the Central Plaza, but while reaching the Grand Cathedral is paramount, we cannot just ignore the events happening as a result of whatever has overtaken the Cathedral Ward. Before moving onward, we should gather what information we can, and at least attempt to quell some of this chaos before it spreads to the rest of Yharnam.
19.goal: Complete the Hunt at the end of a round if you have collected at least 3 Insight. If 3+ Hunters, collect at least 4 Insight: Reveal card 21.

20.title: PREY SLAUGHTERED: CLERIC BEAST
20.story: Now that the beast has been felled, you may continue your search. Rooting through the bodies, you come across one of a Hunter, garbed in the attire of the Church, and the items you seek. It would appear the Church was trying to contain its own mess...
20.body: Distribute the Beast Roar reward and the Cannon firearm among the Hunters.

21.title: ACCESS TO THE CENTRAL PLAZA
21.story: The ringing of the Grand Cathedral's bells cuts through the night. As you pass through the gates to the Central Plaza, a sharp pain enters your head as strange visions flash within. Shaking it off, you continue onward... What was that?
21.body: Distribute the Messenger's Gift and the Caryll Rune: Eye rewards among the Hunters.

22.title: THE OLD HUNTER
22.story: Entering the Tomb of Oedon, you come across the sight of a Hunter standing over a pile of bodies, both human and beast alike-a number of them dressed in the bloodied garb of the Church Hunters and their servants. The old Hunter turns to you. "Even more to cover up the mess? No better than the rest of the beasts!" he yells before charging forth.
22.body:
Surround the Tomb of Oedon tile with Fog Gates. Spawn Father Gascoigne (Phase 2) on its {lamp} space.
He respawns to that space on {reset}.
22.goal: Gain 1 Insight by slaying Father Gascoigne: Reveal cards 20 and 23.

23.title: PREY SLAUGHTERED: FATHER GASCOIGNE
23.story: Sadly, there was no reasoning with this Hunter, and thus he had to be put down. Searching through the bodies, you indeed find what you seek. But as you leave, you do wonder at his words... Just what mess is the Church attempting to cover up?
23.body: Distribute the Caryll Rune: Hunter reward and the Hunter's Blunderbuss firearm among the Hunters.

24.title: GATHERING SURVIVORS
24.story: The streets of the Cathedral Ward are in chaos. Townsfolk flee in panic as the creatures of the Church march through the district, striking down any and all they find. We must locate whatever survivors we can!
24.body: Place 1 Survivor token and 1 Church Giant on each Named Location space (unless Fog Gated), and each time one is revealed. Hunters may Interact on these spaces to claim these tokens and place them on this card. Both the tokens and Giants respawn on these spaces on {reset}.
24.goal: Complete this Mission when {n} +1 tokens have been placed on this card: Reveal card 25.

25.title: LIGHTS FROM THE CATHEDRAL
25.story: From the survivors, you learn that just before the bells of the Cathedral began to ring, a terrible light pierced the night. Shortly after, the creatures descended from the Inner Ward in droves and began attacking all those in their path.
25.body: Distribute 2 Consumables and the Caryll Rune: Formless Oedon reward among the Hunters.

26.title: A LADY IN DISTRESS
26.story: Exploring the tunneling streets of the Cathedral Ward, you come upon a lone house, its door being battered by a hulking Huntsman's Minion. This particular one seems to be wielding a large statue in addition to the common debris usually carried... From inside, you hear the screams of someone in distress.
26.body:
Reveal card 27.
Spawn 1 Huntsman's Minion on the Occupied House tile {enemy?} space instead of the usual Enemy.
It respawns to that space on {reset}.
26.goal: Slay this Huntsman's Minion: Reveal card 28.
26.note: Spawn-space icon is a green round icon; unsure which numbered enemy icon it is.

27.title: HULKING BRUTE
27.body:
Place 1 Insight token on this card. When the Huntsman's Minion would be slain, instead, remove the token and Heal all {dmg} from it. Token is returned on {reset}. Replace its Special with:

SPECIAL: ARCING SWEEP
{slow} {dmg}{dmg}{dmg}{dmg}
Cannot be Staggered.
Targets all Hunters in this space.
Hunters hit are moved 1 space away and suffer Stun.

28.title: A LADY IN DISTRESS
28.story: As the beast falls, the door to the house slowly opens. From inside, a lady emerges. "Oh, thank goodness. You're a Hunter, right? My name is Arianna... Might you know of a safe place? The night is long and I've very little of the incense left..."
28.body: Place 1 Survivor token on the Occupied House space. Any Hunter may pick up the token when they move out of that space. The token is returned to the Occupied House space if the Hunter teleports or goes to the Dream.
28.goal: Complete this Mission when you end a move on the Oedon Chapel tile with the token: Reveal card 29.

29.title: AIDING ARIANNA
29.story: "You weren't lying, this is a safe place! This night has been wretched... There was some terrible light that came from the Cathedral... I-I think I passed out... When I came to, that beast was trying to force its way inside... I'm so glad you came along..."
29.body: Distribute 1 Consumable and the Blood of Arianna reward among the Hunters.

30.title: AN UNKNOWN FIGURE
30.story: You come across a figure dressed in the garb of the Executioners-a Covenant which sometimes gives aid to the Workshop. He greets you: "Ah, a fellow Hunter! Greetings. I am Alfred. I suppose you too have been called out here this night? A Hunter Chief Emblem you say? Interesting... I do indeed know where one might obtain such an item. Perhaps we can make a trade... Assist me in a small task and perhaps I can assist you as well..."
30.goal:
You have no time for such tasks. Demand the information... or else: Reveal card 31.
Agree to assist him: Reveal card 33.

31.title: MAKING AN ENEMY
31.story: "You would threaten me? Just what is the meaning of this? Has the blood gone to your head?!" Alfred moves back, drawing his weapon. "I should have just stuck to the mission. This is what I get for trying to show a bit of compassion for a fellow Hunter!"
31.body:
Surround the Graveyard tile with Fog Gates. Spawn Alfred, Hunter of Vilebloods (represented by his token) on its {enemy?} space.
He respawns to that space on {reset}.
31.goal: Complete this Mission by slaying Alfred: Reveal cards 20 and 32.
31.note: Spawn-space icon is a brown round icon; unsure which numbered enemy icon it is.

32.title: ENEMY OF THE EXECUTIONERS
32.story: Alfred rears back, deeply wounded. "Bloody fools! So quick to run off to your own deaths! Fine, enjoy your fate!" He shouts as he casts the Emblem to your feet. "But know this, you will regret your actions this night!" he curses as he flees.
32.body: Distribute 1 Consumable and the Caryll Rune: Blood Rapture reward among the Hunters.

33.title: SURVEYING THE CHAOS
33.story: "Splendid! My task this night is much like your own: I must see the extent of the destruction that has befallen our dear city. Come, let us make haste, and may the good blood guide our way!"
33.body: Place {n} +2 Insight tokens on this card. Place the Alfred token on the Graveyard space. When a Hunter moves out of his space, Alfred may be moved with them. When Alfred is moved onto a tile, take 1 Insight token from this card and place it on that tile. Each tile may have 1 token.
33.goal: Complete this Mission when this card has no remaining tokens: Reveal cards 20 and 34.

34.title: AIDING THE EXECUTIONERS
34.story: "These are troubling events indeed, my friend... I am saddened we did not meet under better circumstances. Here, as agreed upon, as well as a token of my personal appreciation. I must depart now and report to the others... We shall meet again soon."
34.body: Distribute 1 Consumable and the Executioner's Gloves reward among the Hunters.

35.title: ACCESSING THE CATHEDRAL
35.story: Finally we have gained access to the innermost reaches of the Cathedral Ward. Now all that remains is for us to make our way to the Grand Cathedral itself, and hopefully find the reason for the chaos that has overtaken the district this night.
35.goal: End a move on the Courtyard Lamp tile: Reveal card 36.

36.title: ACCESSING THE CATHEDRAL
36.story: Before you, a large congregation of enemies blocks your path. Worse, from the Cathedral itself a pale light pulses periodically, bathing the area. As it washes over you, your mind fills with incomprehensible voices and images...
36.body:
Reveal card 37.
Surround the Courtyard Lamp tile with Fog Gates. Spawn 2 Church Servants and 1 Church Giant on its {lamp} space. These Enemies are not removed on {reset}, but Heal all {dmg}. They do not respawn. Remove the Fog Gates when these Enemies have been slain, or when the 3rd {reset} space of the Hunt Track is reached.
36.goal: End a move on the Grand Cathedral: Reveal card 38.

37.title: UNSPEAKABLE TRUTHS
37.story: Whatever is radiating from the Grand Cathedral threatens your sanity. Only by focusing your resolve can you keep the whispers at bay.
37.body:
Connect the Grand Cathedral to the Courtyard Lamp tile.
Hunters entering the Grand Cathedral tile suffer Frenzy unless you have collected at least 1 Insight this Chapter.
Hunter's Attacks and Dodges suffer -1 {dmg} and -1 {medium} while on the Grand Cathedral tile unless you have collected at least 2 Insight this Chapter.
37.note: The -1 die icon is a single tan arrowhead, encoded {medium} by color.

38.title: ACCESSING THE CATHEDRAL
38.story: You enter to the sight of a woman knelt in prayer. Before her rests an artifact of the Church-a skull. "Let us partake in communion and feast upon the old blood. Our thirst for blood satiates us, soothes our fears. Seek the old blood..." As she prays, you see the pulses of light are originating from the skull... As a new wave washes over her, all sound ceases. Suddenly, she grips her chest before emitting a deathly shriek, her form erupting into that of a horrid beast.
38.body: Surround the Grand Cathedral tile with Fog Gates. Spawn Vicar Amelia on its {lamp} space. She respawns to that space on {reset}.
38.goal: Complete the Hunt by slaying Vicar Amelia: Reveal card 39.

39.title: HUNT COMPLETED
39.story: Moving forward, you reach toward the glowing skull-that of Laurence, First Vicar of the Healing Church. Touching it, flashes of the past, and perhaps the future, fill your thoughts. You steel your resolve and force them from your mind. You do not quite comprehend the nature of what has transpired here, but this relic will find a new home in the Workshop... As you depart, you hear one final phrase whispered into your mind: "Fear the old blood..."

40.title: OEDON CHAPEL
40.goal:
If you have both Aiding Adella and Aiding Arianna: Reveal card 41.
If you have Aiding Arianna, but do not have Aiding Adella: Reveal card 45.
If you have Aiding Adella, but do not have Aiding Arianna: Reveal card 49.
Otherwise: Reveal card 51.

41.title: A BLOODY SCENE
41.story: Re-entering the old Church, a survivor rushes up to you, ushering you to follow. Doing so, you come across a horrific scene: Arianna, the girl you saved earlier, lies in a pool of blood. "She's dead. Killed stone dead! Musta been a beast, right...? Or d'ya think someone from outside could've... I... I just don't... There's a trail o'blood, Hunter... Leadin' out toward the ol' graveyard."
41.goal: End a move on the Graveyard tile: Reveal card 42.

42.title: A BLOODY SCENE
42.story: Entering the graveyard, you come across the sight of Adella and a Church Servant. Adella's attire is covered in blood, a blade in her hand. "You accepted that wretch's blood... Tainted like the rest... Unfit for Holy Communion... How could you..." She begins to approach you, knife raised. "I can't ha... I can't help myself... hahaha."
42.body:
Reveal card 43.
Place 1 Insight token (Adella) and spawn 1 Church Servant on the Graveyard {enemy?} space instead of the usual Enemy. They are not removed on {reset} and do not respawn once slain.
42.goal: Complete this Mission by slaying these Enemies: Reveal card 44.
42.note: Spawn-space icon is a brown round icon; unsure which numbered enemy icon it is.

43.title: ADELLA
43.body:
Adella has 1 HP.
Any time an Enemy within 1 space of Adella (including herself) flips Ability or Special, they also Block 2 {dmg}.

Adella only Attacks when Basic is flipped:

BASIC: POISONED BLADE
{medium}{medium} {dmg}
Poison

44.title: THE MAD CLERGY
44.story: It is strange. It seems the closer you get to the Grand Cathedral, the higher the depths of madness affecting those around it. The effect seems heightened in those connected to the Church...
44.body: Distribute 1 Blood Echo and the Blood of Adella reward among the Hunters.

45.title: MISSING
45.story: Re-entering Oedon Chapel, you find Arianna missing. Speaking with the other survivors, they say she seemed ill, clutching her stomach and speaking of horrible pains, but none have seen her recently... Near her usual seat, a faint trail of blood leads out of the old Chapel and into the streets... Why would she leave the safety of the Chapel this night?
45.goal: End a move on the Graveyard tile: Reveal card 46.

46.title: MISSING
46.story: The trail grows thin and you fear you have missed it before you begin to hear a strange noise. From among the tombstones a low sound is heard, almost like the cries of a child. Exploring, you come across a horrific sight-the body of Arianna, torn seemingly from within, a grotesque and deformed creature next to her, like a mutated infant.
46.body:
Reveal card 47.
Place 1 Insight token (Celestial Child) and spawn 1 Church Servant on the Graveyard {enemy?} space instead of the usual Enemy. They are not removed on {reset} and do not respawn once slain.
46.goal: Complete this Mission by slaying these Enemies: Reveal card 48.
46.note: Spawn-space icon is a brown round icon; unsure which numbered enemy icon it is.

47.title: CELESTIAL CHILD
47.body:
The Celestial Child has 1 HP.
Any time an Enemy within 1 space of the Celestial Child (including itself) flips Ability or Special, they also Block 2 {dmg}.

The Child only Attacks when Basic is flipped:

BASIC: HORRIFIC CRIES
{fast}{fast}{fast} {dmg}
Frenzy
Cannot be Dodged.
Targets all Hunters within 2 spaces.

48.title: GREAT ONE'S BLESSING
48.story: It is worse than we feared. Whatever has befallen the Cathedral Ward does not originate from our own world... Something far more sinister has taken root here...
48.body: Distribute 1 Consumable and the Caryll Rune: Communion reward among the Hunters.

49.title: OTHERWORLDLY INFLUENCE
49.story: You hear a scream. Turning, you see Adella. She stands, covered in blood, over a man's corpse. You see a flicker of panic in her eyes. "H-help..." she says, gripping her head, madness filling her expression as she begins to move toward you.
49.body:
Reveal card 43.
Place 1 Insight token (Adella) and 1 Church Servant 2 spaces away from yours. They do not respawn once slain.
Complete this Mission when you:
49.goal:
Slay both the Church Servant and Adella: Reveal card 44.
Slay the Church Servant and lure Adella into Oedon Chapel: Reveal card 50.

50.title: VISIONS OF THE PAST
50.story: Adella shakes her head violently. The warding incense seems to be affecting her. Coming to her senses, she speaks "H... Hunter..? It was horrible-visions in my head... Of the Cathedral, of Laurence... Things we were not meant to know..."
50.body: Distribute 1 Blood Echo and the Blood of Adella reward among the Hunters.

51.title: CLEANSING OF THE CHURCH
51.story: Approaching the old Chapel, you hear the sound of screams and conflict. Rushing forth, you find the large doors of the Church ripped open. Entering, you find a grouping of Church Servants within. Many townsfolk lie dead.
51.body:
Reveal card 52.
Surround the Oedon Chapel tile with Fog Gates. Spawn 2 Church Servants on its {lamp} space. They respawn to that space on {reset} and are immune to the effect of Oedon Chapel.
51.goal: Complete this Mission when no Enemies remain on the Oedon Chapel tile: Reveal card 53.

52.title: CHURCH'S BLESSING
52.body:
Place 1 Insight token on this card. If 3+ Hunters, place 1 additional token. When a Church Servant would be slain, instead, remove 1 token and Heal all {dmg} from it. Tokens are returned on {reset}. Replace their Special with:

SPECIAL: FLAMESPRAYER
{medium}{medium} {dmg}{dmg}{dmg}
Stagger
Targets all Hunters within 1 space.

53.title: CHURCH'S TOOLS
53.story: The Church seems intent on removing any who would still survive in the Cathedral Ward, going so far as to send its minions to do its dirty work...
53.body: Distribute the A Call Beyond reward and the Flamesprayer firearm among the Hunters.

54.title: STRENGTH THROUGH BLOOD
54.story: Whatever force has overtaken the Cathedral Ward is attempting to worm its way into our minds. We must steel ourselves against its influence, and there is no better conduit to temper the mind than the channeling of blood-the very essence of the Hunt, and our purpose.
54.body: When Hunters go to the Dream, instead of using Blood Echoes for Upgrading, they may instead discard them to place Insight tokens on this card.
54.goal: Complete this Mission when this card has {n} +2 tokens: Reveal card 55.

55.title: STRENGTH THROUGH BLOOD
55.story: Whatever has affected the lesser minds of the population will not break us. We know our mission, and we know our purpose. None, not even those of the Church, will stand in our way!
55.body: Distribute the Blood Stone Shard reward among the Hunters.

56.title: THE EXECUTIONERS ARRIVE
56.story: As the moon reaches its apex, and the clamoring sound of the Cathedral bells fills the Inner Ward, a new sound is heard echoing through the streets. On swift feet, the sounds of transforming weapons and gunshots ring into the night. En masse, the Hunters of the Executioners Covenant have descended into the streets of the Cathedral Ward.
56.goal:
If you have Aiding the Executioners: Reveal card 60.
Otherwise: Reveal card 57.

57.title: HUNTERS OF THE CHURCH
57.story: Taking to the streets, the Executioners have begun to cut down all those before them, townsfolk and monster alike. Leading them seems to be Alfred. What part do the Executioners play in all this...? Regardless, it appears we might have to fight our own kind if we are to complete our mission...
57.body:
Reveal card 58.
Spawn Alfred (represented by his token) and {n} Executioners (represented by Insight tokens) on the Central Lamp space.
On {reset}, they are not removed, but Heal all {dmg}.
57.goal: Complete this Mission when Alfred and all Executioners have been slain: Reveal card 59.

58.title: EXECUTIONERS
58.body:
Executioners are represented by Insight tokens (Executioner). They are Enemies with 2 HP and do not respawn once slain. If they flip Ability or Special, they use Basic with +1 {medium}, +1 {dmg}, and Stagger.

BASIC: HUNTER'S ZEAL
{medium}{medium} {dmg}{dmg}
Cannot be Staggered.
58.note: The +1 die icon is a single tan arrowhead, encoded {medium} by color.

59.title: PREY SLAUGHTERED: ALFRED
59.story: "Pray for Master Logarius... in my stead..." Alfred utters before falling to the ground. Searching him, you find orders instructing that none must be allowed to escape, especially those who "witnessed" the events in the Grand Cathedral this night.
59.body: Distribute 2 Consumables and the Executioner's Gloves reward among the Hunters.

60.title: EXECUTIONER'S REQUEST
60.story: You come upon Alfred standing over a mound of fresh corpses, all appearing human. He turns, ready to attack, before recognizing you. "Ah! It's you. Praise the good blood... My friend, I bring dire news and a grim task... The plague has contaminated the Ward... And as Hunters, it is our duty to contain it... Don't be fooled, they are all infected. You will aid us, won't you? It would be a pitty to find Hunters neglecting their sacred duty..."
60.goal:
Aid the Executioners in purging the Cathedral Ward: Reveal card 61.
Deny Alfred's request: Reveal card 57.
60.note: Story text appears printed as 'pitty' on the card; transcribed as shown.

61.title: PURGING THE WARD
61.story: "Good to see you understand... Come, let us do what must be done."
61.body: Place 1 Survivor token on each space with a {enemy?} or {lamp} icon, and on new ones when revealed. Hunters may Attack these tokens. When they are Attacked, remove them and place them on this card.
61.goal: Complete this Mission when this card has {n} +2 tokens: Reveal card 62.
61.note: First space icon is a green round icon; unsure which numbered enemy icon it is. Second is a dark blue-grey round icon, encoded {lamp}.

62.title: PURGING THE WARD
62.story: The last survivor pleads as you strike them down. While it is indeed a grim task, this is the duty of a Hunter, to protect the whole of Yharnam. A calmness surrounds you as you hear the bells of the Cathedral. For some reason, they now grant you a small solace...
62.body: Distribute 1 Blood Echo, 1 Consumable, and the Caryll Rune: Beast reward among the Hunters.
